feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Using Outbound Service of another Software Component in BTP
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

We are developing Apps/Services on the BTP in the ABAP Environment. Every service has it's own software component. Different services need the same data (e.g. Business Partner Masterdata) from S4 Systems. To access this data, we created service consumption models and outbound services. As we don't want to create the same service consumption model and outbound service for every App, we want to outsource this coding/artefacts into another "general data connection" software component that every app has access to.

Unfortunately, I cannot access the artifacts of the "general data connection" swc from another swc.

Is there a way, I can access/reuse this data/artifacts so I don't have to recreate it for every App?

Thanks and best regards, Sebastian

entry.title: RAP : Multi Level List (3 level)
entry.content:
Hi,

There seems to be no available documentation on creating Parent-Child-Subchild using the composition and parent associations. On attempting the same, although with the similar code as below, the navigation to the object page of the 3rd level entity does not work on create, and only create a row in the Child 3 level table, without any managed uuid creation or object page navigation:

 

managed;

strict ( 2 );

with draft;

 

define behavior for ZI_G_ROOT alias Root

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Root unique

persistent table ztg_Root

draft table ztg_d_Root

lock master total etag UpdatedDate

authorization master ( instance )

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

create;

update;// ( precheck );

delete;

association _Parent { create; with draft; }

association _Child { with draft; }

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) RootUuid;

 

draft action Resume;

draft action Edit;

draft action Activate optimized;

draft action Discard;

 

draft determine action Prepare;

}

 

define behavior for ZI_G_PARENT alias Parent

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Parent unique

persistent table ztg_Parent

draft table ztg_d_Parent

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

update;

delete;

association _Child { create; with draft; } 

association _Root { with draft; }

 

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ParentUuid;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid;

 

}

 

 

define behavior for ZI_G_CHILD alias _Child

implementation in class zbp_i_g_child unique

persistent table ztg_Child

draft table ztg_d_Child

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

association _Parent { with draft; }

ancestor association _Root { with draft; }

update;

delete;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid, ParentUuid;

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ChildUuid;

}

 

There is another way to create hierarchy using node_id and parent_id with hierarchy and source keywords similar to HANA 2.0 functions, but still eventually the Behavior Definition is important.

Is there a documentation of the same somewhere by SAP?

 

 

I look forward to your response.

 

Best Regards,

Ruchir

entry.title: How to activate the following services in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Please can you tell me how to activate the following services (SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment and SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime) from SAP Cloud ALM, they are created but have not yet been activated, I am attaching a reference image.

entry.title: How can non released function module be used in SAP BTP.
entry.content: Recently we have moved to BTP ABAP cloud environment and we were developing RAP application and while development we found that there are many function module which we were using in S/4 systems were not working due to non released status. May i know how to use those function module or is there any alterative for the same provided. Making a custom will take much load to cloud also it will be hard to copy as inside function module many other function modules are also used.

entry.title: CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR not released in BTP ABAP Environment Standard Plan
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I copied a service/development from ABAP Environment (Free Plan) to ABAP Environment (Standard Plan). While testing the service, I got an an "TYPE_NOT_RELEASED" error for cl_abap_typedescr (see attachment). I don't get this error in the free plan. Does somebody know, what I have to do, to get this working. When checking the properties of class cl_abap_typedescr, I can see that the API State is "released".

 

Thanks and best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Error 'ABAP program lines are wider than the internal table' not showing in other SAP systems
entry.content:
Hi,
I am in Dev system with latest S/4 HANA.
I am modifying an old Z* prog (before 2010) that uses ALV FM: REUSE_ALV_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE.
After my changes its dumping saying "ABAP program lines are wider than the internal table'.

I changed my ABAP editor setting by checking on 'Downwards Compatible length (72) ..etc' & is working fine.

But my other QA system (with latest S/4 HANA) where my code is NOT moved into it yet is NOT showing any dumps yet.

How is this possible?

entry.title: Submit Program not returning Trafiic signal values
entry.content:
Hi Have standard program RREGCH_VM which returning specification data with some statuses, statuses are like Traffic lights green, Red, Yellow.

Requirement is Customer want same stranded output which displayed RREGCH_VM  program  with additional data so, 

i am writing submit Program for same , i got all data except this status data. below is my code.

SUBMIT rregch_vm
EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
AND RETURN.
CALL FUNCTION 'LIST_FROM_MEMORY'
TABLES
listobject = list_tab
EXCEPTIONS
not_found = 1
OTHERS = 2.

CALL FUNCTION 'LIST_TO_ASCI'
EXPORTING
list_index = -1
TABLES
listobject = list_tab
listasci = list_txtlines
EXCEPTIONS
empty_list = 1
list_index_invalid = 2
OTHERS = 3.

Let me know if any issues with my code.

entry.title: Consume oData service from Extension Center( in Different Subaccount) in SAP Build Subaccount
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a requirement to consume the OData service from the Extension Center service (pointed to SAP) in the BTP ABAP on Cloud Environment.

The Extension Center service exists in one subaccount, while the SAP ABAP service exists in a different subaccount.

The cloud connector to the backend system is already set up, and I have created the destination in the ABAP on Cloud subaccount, pointing to the SAP system, based on the instructions provided in the following document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/XF_SERVERLESS_RUNTIME/bf7b2ff68518427c85b30ac3184ad215/35662cf6cb804e1389e999cefae46c36.html

Any hints???

entry.title: BTP ABAP Fiori cross system intend based navigation
entry.content:
Hello,

how can it be achieved to navigate from a fiori app in BTP Abap runtime launchpad to a S4 system launchpad? 

There seems no option to pass another system in the intend based navigation annotations. Is the annotation  type: #WITH_URL the only solution here?

BR

entry.title: Error because of not released Object in BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I have the follwoing problem because of non-released objects.

I created a behavior implementation class zcl_bp_header. In this class, I'm using the method save_modified. This method has an import parameter !UPDATE type DATA.

I created a util-class zcl_util in another Software Component. The classes of this swc contain methods, which shall be used in all services/apps we're creating. A method get_component_names returns a list/table with all names of the components of a given structure. Therefore I use the method cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data_ref( REF #( update-header-%control ) ). 

When I call this method within my zcl_bp_header class, everything works finde. When I call this method within my class zcl_util, I get a runtime error "TYPE_NOT_RELEASED". 

I released (C1) the zcl_util as well as the zcl_bp_header class.

Does anyone know, how to solve this problem?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: SAP ECC Spark to Intel migration on Solaris 10
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are currently working on a project in Saudi Arabia. Our people are renovating a local data center and they were made aware of a very old SAP ECC 6 system. It is a full rack with two SUN Spark M5000 server nodes and a SUN StorageTek 6140 from around 2005.

The system is no longer in use but still functional. The new owner wants to secure the data and has asked us whether the physical system can be moved to a local VM or a cloud platform? The entire rack is to be removed, therefore a safe and hopefully simple migration of the system would have to be planned.

Our DBA has taken a full database export dump and also a full RMAN backup from the underlying Oracle DB system, but we have no experience in migrating the ECC application stack. Kindly note, this platform is running on Solaris 10 on Spark, but we also have virtual machines for Solaris 10 on Intel available.

Ideally the migration would be from physical Solaris 10 on Spark to virtual Solaris 10 on Intel. There are no current users working with this system, but data retention in Saudi is now 10 years and up to 15 years in special cases, therefore the system must be preserved for this purpose only.

We have a strong Oracle DB team but need someone supporting us in the application stack migration.

Thank you.

entry.title: Info type pop ups interrupting back ground jobs
entry.content:
Hi,
I am running a mass back ground job for a Z*prog(se38) which calls other Z*FM to do some FI postings by  
That Z* FM pops-up an info type 'msg i' pops-up for certain validations and i have to hit enter to continue.

So when i schedule my Z* prog in background, this pop up msg  is interrupting the background jobs. How do i suppress this pop up msg in my Z* prog?

 pls suggest.

entry.title: Receiving error while adding new ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse using Service Key
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm getting the below error while adding new ABAP Cloud project in Eclipse using the service key.

Can you please help me out. 

Note:- I've tried deleting the Instance and re-creating the instance and service key , Even this not help me.

Thanks, 

Praveen

entry.title: Upload document/file to BTP DMS repository failed with status 400 using Node JS CAP application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to upload a document/file to BTP DMS Repository using CAP Application developed using Node JS, Below is code snippet :

we are using the above code and getting error with 400 status code on execution, by using the same URL we are able to post document to DMS repository using Business Accelerator HUB API. 

Could you please advice any solution to resolve error 400

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Usage Data Management service (UDMS) - SAP BTP
entry.content:
• Is the Usage Data Management service (UDMS) primarily a service that hosts the API, requiring us to subscribe to a separate storage space to store the data? If so, could you please suggest which storage service is typically used alongside UDMS?
  • If storage is indeed included within the UDMS service, could you kindly let me know the allocated size? The assigned quota is listed as 10 in the BTP cockpit (please see the below screenshot).

entry.title: Screen Exit for ES22 : Add Z*field to table Control
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to add an extra Z*field as a column inside the table control in SAP std screens which will be called by tcodes ES21 & ES22.
This ZZ* field is added in table EVERH .

Screen Painter(Se51) : SAPLES20H
screen # : 0200


How do i do this?

BADI : SMOD_EMDK0001

entry.title: Hierarchy CDS view ABAP - Not able to preview
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am not unable to preview the data for the Hierarchy CDS view. It says there is some authorization checks failure. This CDS view is created in trial BTP ABAP tenant.

Followed steps are mentioned below.

1. Source custom table

2. Define Interface view entity.

3. Define parent child hierarchy.

During data preview, I am getting below Error while processing authorization checks.

 

Kindly let me know how to fix this error.

who will provide valuable solution. Reward will be provided.

Thanks a lot.

Rinkesh Narayan Gupta

entry.title: Maintain Translation App not working properly (BTP, ABAP Environment)
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I created a Service/App with RAP in BTP. For the translation of the text, the app "Maintain Translations" in the ABAP Environment Dashboard must be used. I downloaded the .xlf-file, added the desired translations, uploaded the file again and published it.

Result is, that just some texts have been translated. I'm not able to translate other texts. When I change some texts, which have been transated correctly and reupload/publish the file, the newly changed texts don't get updated again.

I'm testing the translation in the "Fiori Elements Preview App", by changing the language in the URL from EN to DE (&sap-ui-language=DE).

Does anyone know this behavior or knows how to translate correctly. Unfortunately, this is all a black box. I just can down- and upload a .xlf-file and check the result like described above.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: There is requirement from user side user want some customized reports on their Gmail id by automatio
entry.content: There is requirement from user side user want some customized reports on their Gmail id by weekly basis. We want to create an automated system. What will be requirement to achieve this task.

entry.title: API for creating Communication Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there an opportunity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create a Communication User, Communication System, or Communication Arrangement using APIs or classes?
I only found APIs for reading on https://api.sap.com/, but I need creation.

BR,
Oleg Vokh
